description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has three jobs: tests, docs, and style, each running on ubuntu-latest. The tests job uses a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.7 through 3.12, checking out the code, setting up Python, caching pip and tox, installing tox, and running tox -e py. The docs and style jobs check out the code, set up Python 3.12, cache pip and tox, install tox, and run tox -e docs and tox -e style respectively.
